ab: ruavici pakiaturua ihlahlamu musa taupangana kulikulikuli’i, ma mu sipangʉhlʉva patavʉhlʉrʉ pu’a cukahlangʉ.
ch: 今天老師帶我們去動物園，我們在門口排隊買票。
en: Today the teacher took us to the zoo, and we lined up at the gate to buy tickets.

ab: mulavaʉ puaruma taupangana kulikulikuli’i amihla pakiaturua, “ahlicuvungana ia ngahlana ahlamʉ, ilikusuna ngahlana vuhli’i, kiakukucu takacicihli kumita.”
ch: 進入動物園後，老師說:「前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。」
en: After entering the zoo, the teacher said, "There are birds in the front and snakes in the back, so you can visit them yourself."

ab: muluahlʉ ku vuhli’i, kuhlaisai kuaku kumita ngahlana vuhli’i.
ch: 我會怕蛇，所以我不看蛇類。
en: I'm afraid of snakes, so I don't look at snakes.

ab: taratʉahlʉ cu a ku matumuhlu ahlamʉ, ma ahlahlapa kiu’u miapipihlihli, taratʉahlʉ mana tapʉ’ʉna ma ’isʉngʉrʉ malusapʉ.
ch: 我看到了很多鳥，他們在樹上飛來飛去，還有看到貓頭鷹在樹洞裡睡覺。
en: I saw a lot of birds flying around in the trees and saw owls sleeping in tree hollows.

ab: taupangana kulikulikuli’i maru kalavungu mʉlʉngʉsʉ ngunguru, tarʉmʉcʉ kavahlʉ nua lukuhlu, angahli kiariari kunaku akita kani’i kuli’i, arinani hlikumitacu tamuucu masasangarʉ tʉkʉ.
ch: 動物園裡有大象、馬和老虎，我從前沒有看過這些動物，今天看到了真的很開心。
en: There are elephants, horses and tigers in the zoo. I have never seen these animals before. I was really happy to see them today.

ab: hlipitumuhlu cu a ku ’ahlingu, pakita hlamama ku.
ch: 我拍了很多照片，給爸爸媽媽看。
en: I took a lot of pictures and showed them to my parents.

ab: mungahlʉ tumua mʉlʉvʉ hlamama ku mʉcʉkʉhlʉ.
ch: 下次要跟爸爸媽媽一起來。
en: Next time I will come with my parents.
